title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Quiz
description: Test your GitHub Actions pipeline knowledge.

questions.question: What does 'needs: test' do in a GitHub Actions job?

options.text: It marks the job as optional
It declares a dependency — this job only runs after the 'test' job completes successfully
It requires manual approval before the job runs
It runs the test job in parallel with the current job

questions.question: How should you store sensitive values like API keys in GitHub Actions?

options.text: In the workflow YAML file as plain text
In a .env file committed to the repository
As GitHub Secrets, accessed via ${{ secrets.MY_SECRET }}
In a separate public configuration file

questions.question: What does the 'matrix' strategy in GitHub Actions allow?

options.text: Running jobs in sequence with dependencies
Running the same job in parallel with different configurations (e.g., multiple Node.js versions)
